policy: PDB/COD Cα coordinates grade HQIV fold readouts only — never fold inputs.
fold_excludes: NIST/PDG tabulated bond lengths as fold inputs
contact_targets: Derived NeRF prototypes (helix i±3/4, sheet i+2, helix–sheet, hydrophobic scale) + optional seed distances from HQIV spine placement — not witness coordinates

checks.detail: peptide_spine.py contains no witness, PDB, kabsch, or ca_angstrom identifiers — fold path is self-contained.
Browser invokes fold_peptide(seq, ss, closure=…) only; Pyodide exec has no access to witness JSON.
miniprotein_witnesses.json and protein_folder_audit.json are fetched by Vue for compare/RMSD display only.
PDB import sets sequence + SS labels from HELIX/SHEET or backbone φ/ψ; Cα goes to witnessCa prop, not into fold_peptide.
Basin assignment uses 8×8 carrier matrix readout + SS topology — registerTrpCage/registerHairpin profiles removed.
Tertiary contact SSE minimizes distances to spine-derived targets; helix–sheet dress uses HQIV seed trace, not PDB.
N–Cα, Cα–C, C–N from diamond-node θ(Z) and monogamy spectator — same as hqiv_lab/miniprotein_backbone.py.
hqiv_lab/miniprotein_fold.py accepts witness_ca only for post-fold kabsch_rmsd grading in audit scripts.
